case_title: ALEX BLOKKER VS. BRENDA R MC LAUGHLIN LEWIS

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BLOKKER, ALEX
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,550.00 FILED BY BLOKKER, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT MC LAUGHLIN LEWIS, BRENDA R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
